short_description_of_the_course.label: Short Description of the Course
short_description_of_the_course.value: A practical introduction to the foundations of machine learning.

requirements_of_entry.label: Requirements of Entry
value: Mandatory Entry Requirements Working knowledge of mathematics (e.g., matrices, linear spaces and basic geometry, as covered in, for example, Math1RS or Math1RT).
Recommended Entry Requirements Some experience in probability and statistics would be useful but is not essential.

excluded_courses.label: Excluded Courses
excluded_courses.value: Machine Learning (M), Machine Learning for Data Scientists (M)

timetable_and_length_and_frequency_of_te.label: Timetable and length and frequency of teaching sessions

course_aims.label: Course Aims
course_aims.value: To present students with an introduction to the general theory of learning from data and to a number of popular Machine Learning methods.

intended_learning_outcomes_of_course.label: Intended Learning Outcomes of Course

formative_assessment_feedback.label: Formative Assessment & Feedback
formative_assessment_feedback.value: Written feedback on assessed coursework; Verbal feedback during class discussions.
